message:
test(fcp-core): pin CredentialId Display + parse roundtrip (suze4)

Add crates/fcp-core/tests/credential_id_display_roundtrip.rs.
CredentialId(Uuid) is the public credential record identifier
appearing in audit events, decision receipts, and operator-facing
errors. The round-trip pair is `Display → CredentialId::parse` (no
FromStr impl; the parser is the explicit `parse(&str)` method).

16/16 tests pass:

- Display emits UUID 8-4-4-4-12 hyphenated lowercase (36 chars,
  4 hyphens, lowercase hex only).
- Random new() values round-trip cleanly through Display→parse.
- Display→parse preserves Eq + Hash for canonical UUIDs (zero,
  ones, mixed bits).
- from_uuid → as_uuid identity.
- Case-insensitive parse: uppercase, lowercase, mixed-case all
  parse to the same value; Display always emits lowercase.
- Malformed input rejected: empty string, non-UUID string, wrong
  length (truncated, trailing garbage), non-hex chars.
- Equality + hash across new / from_uuid / parse / clone /
  Display→parse construction paths.
- Debug wraps with type name and inner UUID, distinct from Display.
- HashMap key correctness across re-parsed and from_uuid lookups.
- Serde JSON form is quoted hyphenated lowercase UUID string
  (transparent serde wrapper); JSON round-trip preserves Eq + Hash.
- Distinct fixtures are distinct CredentialIds; two new() calls
  produce distinct IDs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
